title: Income Statistics and GST/HST Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Income statistics and GST/HST statistics

## Individual statistical reports
- Federal Electoral District Statistics (FEDS) The Federal Electoral District Statistics (FEDS) tables present individual income tax data based on geographic area and are available by province, territory, and all Canada.
- Individual Statistics by Tax Filing Method (ISTFM) The Individual Statistics by Tax Filing Method (ISTFM) tables present statistics on the filing method of tax filers grouped by their demographic and economic characteristics.
- Individual Tax Statistics by Area (ITSA) Tax data based on geographic area (including Forward Sortation Area and census geographies).
- Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area (FSA) Individual Tax Statistics by Forward Sortation Area data present personal income tax data based on forward sortation areas.
- Individual Tax Statistics by Tax Bracket (ITSTB) Tax data based on federal tax brackets and outlined by province, territory, and all of Canada.
- Selected T1 Statistics Statistics based on the most recently assessed individual income tax and benefit returns.
- Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) Statistics Statistics based on key Tax-Free Savings Account (TFSA) information for a given tax year.
- Individual Income Tax Return Statistics (formerly T1 Final Statistics) Statistics based on approximately 100% of all income tax and benefit returns including reassessments for a given year.
- T1 Filing Compliance Statistics based on individual returns that were filed late or on time for a given tax year.
- T1 Preliminary Statistics Preliminary statistics are based on approximately 95% of income tax and benefit returns excluding the reassessments for a given tax year.

## Benefit and credit statistics
- Canada Child Benefit (CCB) Statistics Statistics based on CCB payments for a given benefit year.
- Canada Workers Benefit (CWB) Statistics Statistics based on the Canada Workers Benefit assessed for a given tax year.
- Climate Action Incentive (CAI) Statistics Statistics based on the Climate Action Incentive for a given tax year.
- Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) Statistics Statistics based on the Canada Carbon Rebate for a given tax year.
- Disability Tax Credit (DTC) Statistics Statistics based on Disability Tax Credit information for a given calendar year.
- Goods and Services Tax/Harmonized Sales Tax (GST/HST) Credit Statistics Statistics based on credit payments for a given benefit year.
- Working Income Tax Benefit (WITB) Statistics Statistics based on Working Income Tax Benefit credits assessed for a given tax year.

## Corporate statistical reports
- T2 Corporate Statistics Key taxation and select accounting information for all corporation tax returns that have been assessed or re-assessed.
- T2 Corporate Scientific Research and Experimental Development (SR&ED) Statistics The T2 Corporate SR&ED statistical tables provide key SR&ED tax and accounting information for all T2 returns that were assessed or reassessed.

## Trust statistical reports
- Trust Statistics The trust statistical tables provide key taxation and select accounting information for all trust tax returns that have been assessed or reassessed.

## Excise tax and duty statistics
- Excise Tax Statistics based on excise taxes assessed for a given fiscal year.
- Excise Duty Statistics based on excise duties assessed for a given fiscal year.

## GST/HST statistical reports
- GST/HST Incremental Federal Rebate for Municipalities Disclosure of the incremental value (42.86%) of the 100% GST, and the federal portion of the HST rebate approved for payment by the Minister of National Revenue to each municipal entity.
- GST/HST Statistics Detailed profiles of goods and services tax/harmonized sales tax (GST/HST) registrants.

## Vulnerable populations statistical reports
- Statistical report on the participation of the hard-to-reach populations in the tax and benefit systems Tax filing and benefit participation rates of hard-to-reach populations, sometimes referred to as vulnerable populations, estimated by linking 2021 Census and Canada Revenue Agency tax data.

## Foreign income verification statement and related statistics
- Foreign Income Verification Statement and Related Statistics Report Foreign income verification statement and related statistics.

## Information returns of non-arm's length transactions with non-residents
- Information Returns of Non-Arm's Length Transactions with Non-Residents Statistics containing information on non-arm’s length transactions between persons resident in Canada and non-resident persons, as reported on form T106.

## Security options deductions, tax years 2007 - 2017
- Security Options Deductions, Tax Years 2007 - 2017 Statistics containing information pertaining to security options deductions as reported on the T1 General Income Tax and Benefit Return for the 2007 to 2017 taxation years.

## Departmental Results Framework (DRF)
- Departmental Results Framework (DRF) Indicators A series of indicators that are part of the Departmental Results Reports (DRR) that inform parliamentarians and Canadians of the results achieved by government organizations for Canadians.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
